alerts.title: Alerts & Evidence
alerts.description: Review liquidity pressure, unusual activity, and data consistency evidence. Signals remain separate unless an explicit combined review exists.
alerts.summary.alert-b-liquidity: Provider A e-money may cross its reserve threshold within 38 minutes.
alerts.summary.alert-b-activity: Repeated cash-out amounts exceed normal outlet activity and require review.
alerts.summary.alert-b-review: Liquidity pressure and unusual activity are both present. Review underlying signals separately.
alerts.summary.alert-c-inconsistency: Conflicting balance snapshot and delayed feed require data verification before forecast use.
alerts.next.alert-b-liquidity: Verify demand context and contact authorized operations.
alerts.next.alert-b-activity: Verify transaction context before taking any operational action.
alerts.next.alert-b-review: Verify each signal independently and contact authorized operations.
alerts.next.alert-c-inconsistency: Verify data. Do not rely on an exact forecast until feed consistency is restored.
cases.title: Cases
alerts.provider_emoney_pressure.review: Provider e-money reserve threshold may be breached.
alerts.shared_cash_pressure.review: Shared physical cash reserve threshold may be breached.
alerts.unusual_activity_review.review: Unusual cash-out velocity or amount concentration detected.
alerts.data_quality_issue.review: Data quality degraded: potential sequence gaps or stale feed.
alerts.combined_review.review: Combined review: liquidity pressure and unusual activity signals overlap.
alerts.next.alerts.provider_emoney_press: Verify demand context and contact authorized operations.
Verify physical vault balance and contact authorized operations.
alerts.next.alerts.unusual_activity_revi: Verify transaction context before taking any operational action.
alerts.next.alerts.data_quality_issue.re: Verify data. Do not rely on an exact forecast until feed consistency is restored.
alerts.next.alerts.combined_review.revie: Verify each signal independently and contact authorized operations.
